overall.description: A high-quality game engine rendering of a waterfall cascading through a rocky canyon. The camera maintains a steady elevated view overlooking the rushing water and stone cliffs, showcasing realistic water physics and natural lighting effects.

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the waterfall from an elevated rocky vantage point

entered.detail: tall dark stone cliff face forming the left wall of the canyon
cascading water flowing over the edge creating white rapids and mist
steep rock wall forming the right boundary of the gorge
boulder sitting in the water flow near the top of the falls
white water spray and mist rising from the base of the waterfall

segments.scene_description: The scene presents a dramatic view of a waterfall cascading through a narrow rocky canyon. From an elevated stationary position, the camera captures the rushing water flowing around a large central boulder and plunging downward, with mist rising from below. The steep stone cliffs frame the waterfall on both sides, creating an enclosed natural gorge with sparse vegetation visible on the ledges.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a dramatic, elevated perspective of a waterfall cascading through a narrow rocky canyon. It begins with a stationary view of the rushing water as it flows around a large central boulder and plunges downward. As the camera lingers, mist rises from the depths of the gorge, partially veiling the base of the falls. The scene then expands to reveal the steep stone cliffs that frame the water on both sides, highlighting the enclosed nature of the gorge. Finally, the view settles on the sparse vegetation clinging to the rocky ledges, contrasting the stillness of the stone with the violent motion of the falls.
